_comment: Shipped preset for Flux Schnell as Shot Images Stage's backend. Same template / same bindings as workflows/image/flux-schnell_preset.json — Shot Images is image generation iterated per shot. ShotImagesStage builds the per-shot prompt and dispatches this workflow once per shot. Result is auto-detected from SaveImage node #9 as ui_save_batch (shot-images is a batch-output kind, see runners/local_comfy.py:_BATCH_OUTPUT_KINDS).
label: Flux Schnell (per-shot)
description: Flux Schnell (fp8) 4-step distilled t2i, one image per Storyboard shot. ShotImagesStage iterates the upstream Storyboard, dispatches this workflow per shot with the shot's prompt as main_prompt, and merges the per-shot images into one COMFYTV_IMAGES batch.
